GMHUB.Settings.BaseUrl.Name: GMhub Base URL
GMHUB.Settings.BaseUrl.Hint: Root URL of your GMhub web app, e.g. https://gmhub.example.com
GMHUB.Settings.ApiKey.Name: GMhub API Key
GMHUB.Settings.ApiKey.Hint: Bearer token used to authenticate against the GMhub REST API.
GMHUB.Settings.AutoPush.Name: Auto-push journal updates
GMHUB.Settings.AutoPush.Hint: When enabled, any journal edited in Foundry is pushed to GMhub immediately.
